use rayon::ThreadPoolBuilder;

// GOOD: global pool built in binary entry point only
pub mod analytics {
    pub fn process_events(events: &[Event]) -> Vec<ProcessedEvent> {
        // Uses whatever global pool the binary configured
        events.par_iter().map(|e| process(e)).collect()
    }
}

pub mod indexer {
    pub fn build_index(docs: &[Document]) -> Index {
        docs.par_iter().map(|doc| index_doc(doc)).collect()
    }
}

// In main.rs or test harness:
fn main() {
    ThreadPoolBuilder::new()
        .num_threads(num_cpus::get())
        .build_global()
        .unwrap();

    // Now run the application
    run_app();
}
